fields.name: Beauty & Health
fields.description: Skincare, makeup and wellness

fields.name: Wireless Noise-Cancelling Headphones
fields.description: Premium over-ear headphones with active noise cancellation, 30-hour battery life, and crystal-clear audio. Compatible with all Bluetooth devices. Perfect for travel, work from home, and everyday listening. Features include touch controls, built-in microphone, and foldable design for easy portability.

fields.name: Mechanical Gaming Keyboard
fields.description: RGB backlit mechanical keyboard with tactile switches, anti-ghosting, and dedicated media controls. Aluminium frame build with N-key rollover for professional gaming. Water-resistant design protects against accidental spills. Includes wrist rest and USB passthrough.

fields.name: Smart Fitness Watch
fields.description: Advanced fitness tracker with heart rate monitoring, SpO2 tracking, GPS, sleep analysis and 7-day battery. Water-resistant up to 50m. Compatible with iOS and Android. Includes step counter, calorie tracker, stress monitor and over 100 sport modes.

fields.name: 4K Ultra HD Webcam
fields.description: Professional 4K webcam with autofocus, dual noise-cancelling microphones, and 90-degree wide-angle lens. Plug-and-play USB-C connectivity. Perfect for streaming, video conferencing, and content creation. Includes privacy shutter and adjustable mount.

fields.name: Portable Bluetooth Speaker
fields.description: 360-degree surround sound portable speaker with 24-hour battery, IPX7 waterproof rating, and built-in power bank. Features deep bass radiator and TWS pairing for stereo sound. Comes with carry strap and USB-C charging cable.

fields.name: Premium Wireless Mouse
fields.description: Ergonomic wireless mouse with 4000 DPI sensor, silent clicks, 6 programmable buttons and 60-hour battery. Works on any surface including glass. USB nano receiver included. Perfect for office, gaming, and creative work.

fields.name: Classic Slim Fit Polo T-Shirt
fields.description: Premium cotton blend polo shirt with breathable fabric and moisture-wicking technology. Features embroidered logo, ribbed collar, and two-button placket. Available in multiple colours. Machine washable. Perfect for casual outings and smart-casual settings.

fields.name: Slim Fit Chino Trousers
fields.description: Modern slim fit chinos made from stretch cotton blend for all-day comfort. Features zip fly, belt loops, and two side and two back pockets. Wrinkle-resistant fabric keeps you looking sharp. Ideal for office wear or casual outings.

fields.name: Running Shoes Pro Elite
fields.description: Lightweight running shoes with responsive foam midsole, breathable mesh upper, and durable rubber outsole. Features heel counter for stability, padded ankle collar and reflective details for night runs. Available in half sizes.

fields.name: Ergonomic Office Chair
fields.description: Premium mesh ergonomic chair with adjustable lumbar support, 4D armrests, headrest, and seat depth adjustment. Supports up to 150kg. Breathable mesh back keeps you cool. Tilt lock mechanism with tension control. 5-year warranty.

fields.name: Scented Soy Candle Set (3-Pack)
fields.description: Handcrafted premium soy wax candles with cotton wicks and calming fragrance blends: Lavender & Vanilla, Sandalwood & Cedar, and Fresh Citrus. Each candle burns for 45+ hours. Packaged in an elegant gift box. Perfect for gifting or home ambience.

fields.name: Bamboo Kitchen Organiser Set
fields.description: Sustainable bamboo kitchen utensil holder and cutting board set. BPA-free, eco-friendly and easy to clean. Set includes large utensil holder, small condiment rack, and premium chopping board with juice groove. Perfect wedding or housewarming gift.

fields.name: Atomic Habits by James Clear
fields.description: The phenomenal #1 Sunday Times bestseller about how tiny changes lead to remarkable results. Packed with evidence-based strategies for building good habits and breaking bad ones. With over 10 million copies sold worldwide, this is the ultimate guide to behaviour change.

fields.name: The Psychology of Money
fields.description: A timeless exploration of the strange ways people think about money and how to make better financial decisions. Morgan Housel shares 19 short stories exploring the surprising roles that luck, risk, greed and fear play in personal finance and investing.

fields.name: Adjustable Dumbbell Set (2–24kg)
fields.description: Space-saving adjustable dumbbell set that replaces 9 pairs of weights. Quick-adjust selector dial changes weight in seconds from 2kg to 24kg in 2kg increments. Durable steel and plastic construction with moulded handles for comfort. Includes storage tray.

fields.name: Yoga Mat Premium Non-Slip
fields.description: 6mm thick premium TPE yoga mat with alignment lines, non-slip surface and excellent cushioning for joints. Eco-friendly, odour-free material. Includes carry strap and bag. Suitable for yoga, pilates, stretching and floor workouts. 183cm x 61cm.

fields.name: Vitamin C Brightening Serum
fields.description: 20% stable Vitamin C serum with hyaluronic acid and niacinamide. Brightens skin, reduces dark spots, boosts collagen production and provides antioxidant protection. Suitable for all skin types including sensitive. Dermatologist tested. 30ml bottle.

fields.name: Charcoal Face Wash 150ml
fields.description: Deep cleansing activated charcoal face wash that removes impurities, excess oil and unclogs pores. Enriched with tea tree oil and aloe vera for a refreshing clean. Suitable for oily and combination skin. Sulfate-free and paraben-free formula.
